# freezeObjects

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the freezeObjects mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk freeze-objects --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.sId <UUID> --input.id <UUID>
```

## Examples

### Run freezeObjects

```bash
csdk freeze-objects --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.sId <UUID> --input.id <UUID>
```
